news.headline: With an eye on China, Japan looks to kamikaze drones and low-cost missiles
news.summary:
Japan plans to introduce a fleet of kamikaze drones and low-cost missiles to boost deterrence against regional threats including China, according to Japanese media reports.

news.headline: Malaysia urged to take more aggressive action to tackle energy crisis
news.summary:
Malaysia has so far been spared the worst of the regional energy crunch, but experts say the government needs to move quickly and take more aggressive measures to prevent a worsening economic crisis if the Iran war becomes a drawn-out conflict.

news.headline: Rats versus pets: Hong Kong dog owners want rodent poison in boxes, not bags
news.summary: Hong Kong pet owners have called for environmental authorities to place rat poison in boxes instead of hanging them in transparent bags, with one owner saying his dog had to visit the veterinarian three times in recent months after accidentally consuming pellets that spilled from broken bags onto th

news.headline: Why ‘dung collector’ was a highly lucrative profession in ancient China
news.summary:
In ancient China, a highly lucrative and fiercely competitive profession known as the “dung collector” brought its exponents significant profits.
These people were responsible for gathering human waste, otherwise known as night soil, from residents’ chamber pots.

news.headline: Russia conducts massive rolling aerial attacks on Ukraine
news.summary: Russia conducted rolling aerial attacks across Ukraine that began with overnight drone barrages followed by daytime missile and drone attacks that killed six people, Ukrainian officials said Friday.
